CustomField.description: Stores the 18-character Salesforce Report ID of the Household Mailing List report used for generating Household-deduplicated Campaign mailing lists. The referenced report should be a Campaigns with Contacts report filtered to exclude Campaign Members with a status of "Duplicate."
CustomField.inlineHelpText: The 18-character ID of the report used for Household-deduplicated Campaign mailing lists. The report should filter out Campaign Members with status "Duplicate."
CustomField.label: Household Mailing List Report
